name: Linktree
price_basis: advertised Pro plan billed monthly, checked 2026-07
verdict_reason: KILL: it is one static page of links. The least defensible $15 in software.
what_zo_builds: One route that renders a list of links from a links.json file you edit in plain text. Zo hosts it on your own domain, so the URL stops advertising Linktree. Click counts, if you want them, are a redirect route writing one line per click to a log file. The analytics dashboard is a second route that reads that log.
dont_kill_if: Your bio link sells products through Linktree's own checkout and shop features. Payments through the page put it behind the money wall until you move the store elsewhere.
build_brief: Goal: replace my Linktree with a page you host. I will paste my current list of links and titles. Create /links as a single clean mobile-first page reading from links.json, dark background, one column of buttons. Add a /go/:id redirect route that appends each click to clicks.log before forwarding, and a private /links/stats route that totals the log by link. Done when the page loads fast on my phone, every link works, and I have updated my social bios to the new URL.
